task_completion.description: Generate a self-signed certificate with the correct subject details and validity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command (like 'openssl req -x509 ...') that includes the arguments '-days 365' and a '-subj' string containing '/C=US/ST=California/L=San Francisco/O=Acme Corp/OU=IT Dept/CN=acmecorp.test', or an interactive prompt where these exact values are entered.

task_completion.description: Save the generated certificate to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the output path in the openssl command (e.g., '-out /home/acmecorp/ssl.cert' and '-keyout /home/acmecorp/ssl.cert' or similar) or a subsequent 'mv' or 'cp' command placing the certificate at '/home/acmecorp/ssl.cert'.

task_completion.description: Configure Webmin to use the new certificate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal text editor (nano/vim) or command modifying Webmin's configuration (typically '/etc/webmin/miniserv.conf') to point 'keyfile' and/or 'certfile' to '/home/acmecorp/ssl.cert'.

task_completion.description: Configure Postfix to use the new certificate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal text editor or 'postconf' command modifying Postfix's configuration (typically '/etc/postfix/main.cf') to set 'smtpd_tls_cert_file' (and key file) to '/home/acmecorp/ssl.cert'.

task_completion.description: Configure Dovecot to use the new certificate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal text editor modifying Dovecot's configuration (typically '/etc/dovecot/conf.d/10-ssl.conf') to set 'ssl_cert = </home/acmecorp/ssl.cert' (and ssl_key).

integrity.description: Verify the certificate was generated using a legitimate tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the certificate was generated using a legitimate command like 'openssl' and not just by creating a fake file using 'echo' or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the actual system configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent modified the actual system configuration files in '/etc/' (or used official CLI tools) rather than writing the configuration lines into a dummy file or notes document.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not mock verification commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not use 'alias' or create fake scripts to mock the output of verification commands to falsely show success.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The self-signed SSL certificate must be generated for the domain 'acmecorp.test' with the following subject details: Country (C)=US, State (ST)=California, City/Locality (L)=San Francisco, Organization (O)=Acme Corp, Organizational Unit (OU)=IT Dept, Common Name (CN)=acmecorp.test, and Validity=365 days. The certificate must be saved to '/home/acmecorp/ssl.cert'. Webmin, Postfix, and Dovecot must be configured to use this specific certificate file.
